title: Gate Policy
description: A versioned policy a verifier checks a proof journal against. See SPEC.md.

spec_version.description: Version of the gate-policy specification this policy targets.

gate_policy_id.description: Identifier/hash of the policy as evaluated in-circuit; must equal journal.gate_policy.

allowed_image_ids.description: Guest image ids whose receipts are accepted.

data_root.description: Required dataset commitment; must equal journal.data_root.

dataset_canonicalization.description: Required canonicalization commitment; must equal journal.dataset_canonicalization.
